conditions.condition: Install or restore scipy/matplotlib, run the real optimizer path, and reconfirm the sign contract on real theta outputs before any confirmatory NSFC result is trusted.

rationale: Firewall, one-sided orientation, rolling-to-rolling prefix slicing, trace schema, support/OOD/abstention, three recomputable views, InterHub-only conformal boundary, and verifier/guard separation were independently checked without reading outcomes. The optimizer stub limits real-theta confirmation but does not undermine formula, slicing, schema, or firewall conclusions.
